response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar
ENTITY Order
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR registration_date : date
REL Order -> Client : 0..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar
ENTITY OperationType
PK operation_type_id
ATTR operation_type_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_type_name : varchar
ENTITY WorkCenter
PK work_center_id
ATTR work_center_id : integer : PK
ATTR work_center_name : varchar
ENTITY OrderOperation
PK order_operation_id
ATTR order_operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR order_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_type_id : integer : FK
ATTR work_center_id : integer : FK
ATTR start_datetime : datetime
ATTR quantity : decimal
REL OrderOperation -> Order : 0..N -> 1 : FK=order_id
REL OrderOperation -> Material : 0..N -> 0..N : FK=material_id
REL OrderOperation -> OperationType : 0..N -> 0..N : FK=operation_type_id
REL OrderOperation -> WorkCenter : 0..N -> 0..N : FK=work_center_id
